rules.name: hard_cost_ceiling
rules.description: No single agent action may exceed $5.00 without human approval.

rules.name: block_destructive_intents
rules.description: Prevent agents from executing known-dangerous operations.

rules.name: high_value_transactions_need_priority
rules.description: On-chain transactions over a certain class require priority >= 7.

rules.name: quarantined_agents
rules.description: Agents that have been administratively suspended.

rules.name: kaizen_substitute_gemini-flash_3
rules.description: Auto-optimised: Use claude-opus for logic_density=3 -> Use gemini-flash for logic_density=3
